title: gunneraceae
intro: The rank of Gunneraceae is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the gunnera family. It is a small group of plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Gunneraceae family is characterized by its unique and varied species, which include aquatic and terrestrial plants, and are often known for their large, distinctive leaves. This family is named after the Swedish botanist Jonas Carl Lieden Gmelin's colleague, Johan Erik Gunnerus.
